summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.preferences; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Control; import eu.kalafatic.utils.Activator; import eu.kalafatic.utils.constants.APreferencePage; import eu.kalafatic.utils.factories.GUIFactory; public class GeminiPreferencePage extends APreferencePage { public GeminiPreferencePage() { super.noDefaultAndApplyButton(); setPreferenceStore(Activator.getDefault().getPreferenceStore()); setDescription(Activator.getPluginProperties().getString("aboutText")); } @Override protected Control createContents(Composite parent) { Composite container = GUIFactory.INSTANCE.createComposite(parent, 1); return container; }
